title: rubus henkeri
intro: Rubus henkeri, also known as the Himalayan raspberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family native to the Himalayas. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Rubus henkeri include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. Rubus henkeri is typically prepared for consumption as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also used in herbal remedies and supplements.
